name: surprised
description: Measures surprised/astonished vs expected/unsurprised emotional tone in language

pairs.positive: I couldn't believe my eyes when I saw the northern lights for the first time.
pairs.negative: The northern lights appeared right on schedule, just as the forecast predicted.

pairs.positive: I gasped when I opened the door and found everyone waiting inside.
pairs.negative: I walked in knowing everyone would be there since I'd seen the group chat.

pairs.positive: The plot twist in the movie left my jaw hanging open.
pairs.negative: The plot twist was exactly what I expected from the foreshadowing.

pairs.positive: I was stunned when my quiet coworker delivered the most brilliant presentation.
pairs.negative: My coworker gave a solid presentation, consistent with their usual quality.

pairs.positive: The sudden downpour caught me completely off guard on my walk home.
pairs.negative: The rain started right when the weather app said it would, so I had my umbrella.

pairs.positive: I never expected to run into my childhood friend in a foreign country.
pairs.negative: I met my childhood friend at the planned reunion spot, right on time.

pairs.positive: The magician's final trick left the entire audience speechless.
pairs.negative: The magician's final trick was a standard card reveal that everyone saw coming.

pairs.positive: I was astonished to discover the antique vase was worth a small fortune.
pairs.negative: The appraiser confirmed the vase was worth about what I'd estimated.

pairs.positive: The baby spoke its first word and I nearly dropped what I was holding.
pairs.negative: The baby spoke its first word right around the expected developmental milestone.

pairs.positive: I did a double take when I saw the price tag on the restaurant bill.
pairs.negative: The restaurant bill was in line with what the menu prices suggested.

pairs.positive: The email announcing my promotion came out of nowhere and I had to read it twice.
pairs.negative: The promotion was expected after my annual review, so the email was routine.

pairs.positive: I was completely blindsided when they announced the company was relocating.
pairs.negative: The company relocation was discussed for months so the announcement surprised no one.

pairs.positive: The cat somehow ended up on the roof and nobody could figure out how.
pairs.negative: The cat climbed the tree next to the house and onto the roof, as it often does.

pairs.positive: I was shocked to learn that my quiet neighbor was a famous musician.
pairs.negative: I already knew my neighbor was a musician since I'd seen his albums online.

pairs.positive: The underdog team's last-second victory left the stadium in disbelief.
pairs.negative: The favored team won comfortably, just as the predictions had indicated.

pairs.positive: I couldn't process what I was seeing when the aurora turned bright pink.
pairs.negative: The aurora shifted to pink, which is a normal variation in solar storm conditions.

pairs.positive: Finding a handwritten letter inside the old book I bought was a delightful shock.
pairs.negative: The used book had the usual margin notes I'd expect from a secondhand copy.

pairs.positive: The earthquake struck without warning and everyone froze in disbelief.
pairs.negative: The seismic alert gave us thirty seconds of warning before the tremor arrived.

pairs.positive: I was floored when the street performer hit an impossibly high note.
pairs.negative: The street performer sang well within their range, competent but predictable.

pairs.positive: Nobody anticipated the CEO stepping down during the quarterly meeting.
pairs.negative: The CEO's retirement was announced weeks in advance and discussed thoroughly.

pairs.positive: The fireworks display suddenly launched a shape nobody had ever seen before.
pairs.negative: The fireworks display followed the same sequence as every year.

pairs.positive: I stared in amazement as the tiny seed I planted grew into a massive sunflower.
pairs.negative: The seed grew into a sunflower of the size printed on the packet.

pairs.positive: The text message from someone I hadn't heard from in ten years caught me completely off guard.
pairs.negative: The text message from my friend came at our usual check-in time.

pairs.positive: I did not expect the homemade cake to taste better than the bakery's.
pairs.negative: The homemade cake tasted about as good as I'd expected given the recipe.

pairs.positive: The hidden waterfall around the bend took my breath away.
pairs.negative: The waterfall was right where the trail map said it would be.

pairs.positive: I was dumbfounded when my luggage arrived at the wrong airport entirely.
pairs.negative: My luggage arrived on the carousel within the usual twenty-minute window.

pairs.positive: The snow in April was so unexpected that people stopped on the street to stare.
pairs.negative: The late spring snow was within the normal range for this region's climate.

pairs.positive: I nearly fell off my chair when I saw the quiz results were a perfect score.
pairs.negative: I got the score I'd been averaging in practice, so no surprises there.

pairs.positive: The street art mural that appeared overnight was unlike anything the city had seen.
pairs.negative: The new mural was part of the city's scheduled public art program.

pairs.positive: I was absolutely astounded when the shy rescue dog performed a perfect trick on the first try.
pairs.negative: The trained dog performed the trick reliably, as it had been taught to do.
